user.title: Shutters Management
user.description: Configure shared notification settings. Add shutter schedules afterwards by adding instances on the integration's hub.

data.notify_services: Notification services to call after each action (leave empty to disable)
data.sequential_covers: Operate covers one at a time, in random order (waits for each cover to finish before starting the next)
data.tts_targets: Smart speakers to announce on (leave empty to disable)

abort.already_configured: Shutters Management is already configured. Add a new schedule by creating an instance on the existing hub.

data.notify_services: Notification services to call after each action (leave empty to disable)
data.sequential_covers: Operate covers one at a time, in random order (waits for each cover to finish before starting the next)
data.tts_targets: Smart speakers to announce on (leave empty to disable)

error.name_required: Choose a name for this instance.

abort.already_configured: An instance with this name is already configured.

data.open_time: Opening time (used when trigger is fixed)
data.open_offset: Opening offset in minutes (used when trigger is sunrise/sunset)

data.close_time: Closing time (used when trigger is fixed)
data.close_offset: Closing offset in minutes (used when trigger is sunrise/sunset)

data.open_time: Opening time (used when trigger is fixed)
data.open_offset: Opening offset in minutes (used when trigger is sunrise/sunset)

data.close_time: Closing time (used when trigger is fixed)
data.close_offset: Closing offset in minutes (used when trigger is sunrise/sunset)

confirm_no_presence.title: No presence source detected
confirm_no_presence.description: You enabled "Run only when away" but no presence entity is configured and no person.* entity exists. The simulation will run anyway. Continue?

run_now.name: Run now
run_now.description: Trigger an immediate opening or closing of every configured schedule, bypassing day, randomization and presence conditions.

action.name: Action
action.description: Whether to open or close the shutters.

pause.name: Pause
pause.description: Pause every schedule. Scheduled triggers are ignored until resumed.

resume.name: Resume
resume.description: Resume every schedule after a pause.
